_comment: Interaction *_has_ever_flag attributes for Hightouch → POST /api/ingest/users. Canonical list: src/lib/constants/interaction-flags.ts (pinned by tests/regression/ingest-users-preferred-channel-flag-fields.test.ts). Paste _template into the JSON editor, or merge the attributes block into an existing user-profile sync.
_notes: Hightouch source column names match the Nexus attribute keys (snake_case) — map row['<flag>'] directly.
Booleans render as raw true/false (no quotes). Do not use | json on boolean fields.
Absent/null warehouse values default to false via | default: false.
These flags drive interaction-flag agent goals (first_interaction / any_interaction conversion types).
